subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast turned unto God and believed in the Lord of all worlds, and hast quaffed the wine of reunion from the hand of thy bountiful Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما اقبلت و آمنت بالله رب العالمین و شربت رحیق الوصال من ید عطا ربک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
